title: Debug
description: Use this admin area to inspect temporary diagnostics and internal debugging tools.
placeholderBody: Append a form ID to this route to inspect edit lock subscribers and events for a specific form, for example /en/admin/debug/<form-id>.
formDebugDescription: This page shows the current edit lock state, active SSE streams, subscriber counts, and a live event feed for one form.
activeStreamsDescription: These are the currently open edit-lock event streams from the form builder for this form. A value of 0 means no editor currently has that SSE route open. This admin debug page is not counted. The internal stream key format is userId:formId.
lockOwnedByCurrentViewer: The current authenticated viewer owns the lock.
lockOwnedByAnotherUser: Another user currently owns the lock.
noCurrentLock: There is no active edit lock for this form.
noActiveStreams: There are no active edit lock streams for this form.
noEventsYet: No edit lock events have been received yet.
snapshotError: The debug snapshot could not be loaded.
eventLockStateLocked: Lock status after this event: locked.
eventLockStateUnlocked: Lock status after this event: unlocked.
